# Gianluca Orpello

> iOS Engineer, Apple Certified Trainer, and startup co-founder based in Naples, Italy. Available immediately for remote and EU roles.

Gianluca Orpello is an iOS Engineer with 8+ years of experience building and shipping Swift and SwiftUI applications across the full Apple platform. He is an Apple Certified Trainer (LearnQuest / Apple) who has personally mentored over 100 developers. He co-founded Tilted Penguins and built morganize.it from first commit to a successful acquisition by a private investor. He is currently Co-Founder and Lead Software Engineer at Unicorn Donkeys, building Defenso.it — a LegalTech platform for automating complex legal workflows using SwiftUI and Server-Side Swift.

## Core expertise

- Swift and SwiftUI (8+ years, production across iOS, iPadOS, macOS, watchOS, tvOS, visionOS)
- The Composable Architecture (TCA), MVVM, Swift Concurrency, modular architecture
- Full Apple ecosystem: iOS SDK, UIKit, AVFoundation, PencilKit, SpriteKit, Core Spotlight
- Backend: Server-Side Swift, Node.js, Express, MongoDB, REST APIs, Docker, GitHub Actions
- Apple Certified Trainer (LearnQuest / Apple): Swift, SwiftUI, iOS SDK — delivered to global enterprise engineering teams
- Startup building: co-founder, product lifecycle ownership, team leadership, successful exit

## Career highlights

- Co-founded Tilted Penguins s.r.l.s. and built morganize.it end-to-end; product acquired by a private investor (asset exit)
- iOS Developer & Code Mentor at Apple Developer Academy, Naples (October 2021 – June 2025): mentored 100+ developers, ran UX design process, led teams of 4–6
- Apple Certified Trainer freelancing for Apple / LearnQuest since 2019: delivered authorized Swift, SwiftUI and iOS SDK training to enterprise engineering teams worldwide
- Full-Stack Developer intern at Gulliver s.r.l. (2018): Angular, TypeScript, MongoDB
- iOS Developer intern at Apple Developer Academy, Naples (2018–2019)
- Conference speaker and technical mentor at Apple Developer Academy events
- Currently building Defenso.it at Unicorn Donkeys: SwiftUI + TCA + Server-Side Swift, LegalTech

## Certifications

- Apple Certified Trainer — App Development with Swift (Apple)
- Apple Search Ads Certified (Apple)
- Apple Developer Academy Graduate (Apple Developer Academy @ Università degli Studi di Napoli Federico II)
- CS50: Introduction to Computer Science (Harvard University / edX)
- CS50's Web Programming with Python and JavaScript (Harvard University / edX)
- CCNA: Introduction to Networks (Cisco)
- Fundamentals of Digital Marketing (Google)

## Education

- BSc Computer Engineering (in progress) — eCampus University
- Apple Developer Academy — Università degli Studi di Napoli Federico II (2018–2019)

## Pages

- [Portfolio](https://gianlucaorpello.com/): Full career history, projects, skills, certifications, and contact
- [Blog](https://gianlucaorpello.com/blog/): Technical writing on Swift, SwiftUI, TCA, and startup building

## Published apps

- OUTSOON (iOS) — Movie tracker built with TCA and Swift Concurrency. Available on the App Store.
- Delegibus (iOS, iPadOS, macOS) — Integrates Italian law into Spotlight search via Server-Side Swift scraping. Available on the App Store.
- morganize.it — Acquired product (no longer under Gianluca's ownership).
